notes: SHIP v1.14.263 - U-MAP RU LABEL LEGIBILITY FIX. John (device-verifying .262 void): cant see the RU numbers. Root cause: in .261 the glass bands went full-width (left:3px right:3px) and the hybrid .scrubbar-slot carries z-index:2 = the SAME z as .scrubbar-u-label, so where a band covers a U the band paints OVER the number and HIDES it (worse than dim); the .262 true-black void made it starker. Design intent (owner-ruled .260) puts numerals on the U-MAP/MINI strip, ticks-only on the 3D rails - so the strip labels are where the numbers live. FIX (CSS-only, 1 rule): RU labels -> z-index:4 (above the bands z-2/engaged z-3, below carriage z-5) + font-size 9px + weight 600 + color #c9d8e4 + contrast text-shadow so they read over the tint. Screenshot self-verified: U42..U1 now crisp over every band. body.rd-scoped -> ?legacy=1 byte-identical. Gates: node --check 4/0; CSS balanced; NUL 0; ctrl==prev; three-stamp .262->.263. NOT device-verified - John iPhone gate pending.
